heading: Intelligence Community Chief Data Officer
label: 3034b Intelligence Community Chief Data Officer
notes: Amendments2023—Subsec. (c)(4). inserted “relating to data” after “duties”.Pub. L. 118–31

Removal of Unrelated Duties and Functions, , , provided that:Pub. L. 118–31, div. G, title III, § 7310(b)(2)137 Stat. 1028Dec. 22, 2023“Not later than 90 days after the date of the enactment of this Act [], consistent with section 103K(c) of the National Security Act of 1947 (), as amended by paragraph (1), the Director of National Intelligence shall complete such internal reorganization of the Office of the Director of National Intelligence as the Director determines necessary to ensure that the duties of the Intelligence Community Chief Data Officer appointed under such section do not include any other duty that does not relate to an issue involving data.”Dec. 22, 202350 U.S.C. 3034b(c)

children.heading: Intelligence Community Chief Data Officer
children.label: a Intelligence Community Chief Data Officer
children.text: There is an Intelligence Community Chief Data Officer within the Office of the Director of National Intelligence who shall be appointed by the Director of National Intelligence.

children.heading: Requirement relating to appointment
children.label: b Requirement relating to appointment
children.text: An individual appointed as the Intelligence Community Chief Data Officer shall have a professional background and experience appropriate for the duties of the Intelligence Community Chief Data Officer. In making such appointment, the Director of National Intelligence may give preference to an individual with experience outside of the United States Government.
act as the chief representative of the Director of National Intelligence for data issues within the intelligence community;

coordinate, to the extent practicable and advisable, with the Chief Data Officer of the Department of Defense to ensure consistent data policies, standards, and procedures between the intelligence community and the Department of Defense;
assist the Director of National Intelligence regarding data elements of the budget of the Office of the Director of National Intelligence; and
perform other such duties relating to data as may be prescribed by the Director of National Intelligence or specified in law.
